title: projectile room-visibility list written via raw +0xCC, corrupting fields the named-field readers consume

evidence.path: src/game/chrobjhandler.c:5352/5363 write *((u8*)obj->projectile+0xCC+i)=val/0xFF (struct Projectile*). Projectile has 3 pointers before 0xCC (ownerprop@0x88, sound1@0x98, sound2@0x9C; bondtypes.h:2568), so unkCC shifts (native >=0xD8). The writer at 2526 uses projectile->unkCC and readers (5116/5266/5286/5295) pass &proj->unkCC -> the raw +0xCC writer corrupts unkC0/C4/C8 and never updates the list readers consume. Reachable: projectile crossing rooms. Fix: *((u8*)&obj->projectile->unkCC + i).

src/game/chrobjhandler.c:5352 writes &obj->projectile->unkCC (named field, matching the writer at 2526 and readers at 5116/5266); raw +0xCC corrupted unkC0/C4/C8 on the pointer-grown Projectile. Byte-identical on all 7 tapes (room-cross path not exercised); gated GE007_NO_PROJECTILE_ROOM_OFFSET_FIX.
